creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jethro Nederhof from comment #54)

In relation to this commit:

https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/libxfce4ui/-/commit/85d8d390f9f2265613da4291992523937a7a2519#80f74afa9222af5979dad472e393792fb0194051_175_183

user reports seem to indicate that adding back the ungrab line (code line 175) seems to really fix this issue.

Is this the consensus? I could test adding back that line in our port and lobby upstream for such a change.


As I already said I'm not experiencing this issue, so I can't test myself, but if such a commit would solve this issue for most users I'll be happy to do it.
